answers: Lean = eliminate waste and maximize value. Originally from Toyota Production System. Focus: deliver more with less.
8 wastes (DOWNTIME): Defects, Overproduction, Waiting, Non-utilized talent, Transportation, Inventory, Motion, Extra-processing.
Lean tools: 5S (organize), Kaizen (continuous improvement), Value Stream Mapping, Kanban, Just-in-Time.
Lean vs Six Sigma: Lean focuses on removing waste and speed, Six Sigma on reducing variation. Lean Six Sigma combines both.
